## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality not to work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation / tests only
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/ -q` in the `backend/` folder and all 83 tests still pass
- [ ] I ran `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npx vite build` in the `frontend/` folder and both succeed
- [ ] If I changed calculation logic, I updated the relevant file under `docs/Ginzu understanding/`
- [ ] If I added a new methodology option, I added it as a dropdown on the frontend too (not just backend)
- [ ] If this references a Damodaran source, I linked it in the PR description or in a code comment
